description_long: This is a well-used Kipsta Sandíya volleyball, featuring a classic stitched panel design with alternating red, white, and dark blue segments. The surface is visibly worn, with scuff marks, faded logos, and discoloration, indicating extensive outdoor use. The branding 'KIPSTA' and 'Sandíya' are prominently displayed on one panel, while another panel shows a circular 'beach volleyball' logo with a stylized bird and net. The seams are clearly visible, with machine stitching holding the panels together. The ball appears slightly dirty, with grime and wear especially evident along the seams and colored panels. Its overall shape is spherical, and the material looks like synthetic leather over an air-filled bladder.
description: A worn Kipsta Sandíya volleyball with red, white, and blue stitched panels, visible branding, and significant surface wear. The ball shows scuffing, faded logos, and dirt, indicating heavy outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Sandíya' and 'KIPSTA' branding on red and white panels, with visible dirt and wear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular 'beach volleyball' logo and text, with pronounced scuff marks and faded print.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more faded and dirty panels, with less visible branding and a barcode partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the 'beach volleyball' logo and additional scuffing, with the red and blue panels showing discoloration.
attribute_brand_logo: The object features a visible 'KIPSTA' logo in bold red letters on a white panel, and the word 'Sandíya' in a script font on a red panel. There is also a circular 'beach volleyball' logo with a stylized bird and net, along with additional text. All logos and text are printed directly on the panels.
attribute_panel_pattern: 12 curved panels arranged in an alternating color pattern
attribute_stitching_type: Machine-stitched with visible seams and regular stitch pattern along the panel edges
attribute_wear_marks: Significant scuff marks, faded logos, discoloration, and dirt accumulation, especially near seams and colored panels
